allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET; ET.fromstring\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\('well-formed'\)")

Bash(python -c "import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET; ET.parse\('sitemap-zh-fetched.xml'\); print\('WELL-FORMED'\)")
